name: Auxo Calent Vaporizer
summary: A dual-heating portable vaporiser for dry herb with app control and a long-life battery, for patients who want a durable everyday device.
description: The Auxo Calent pairs conduction with infrared heating in a compact aluminium body, heating in 20-30 seconds with four preset temperatures across a 180-220C range. A 360-degree zirconia ceramic mouthpiece and magnetic lid make loading and use easy, and the 2900mAh battery supports around 90 minutes of use per charge over USB-C. Optional Bluetooth app connectivity unlocks finer control for those who want it. Backed by a 10-year warranty, it suits patients who want a robust, well-built everyday vaporiser at a sensible price.
